candidate.title: Asterfusion Helium and CX102S-DPU catalog field promotion

local_checks.raw_manifest_scan: Existing local captures found and reused: raw/crawler/compute-accelerators-asterfusion-helium-dpu/20260706T204116820726Z-asterfusion-com-product-helium-dpu-121181ec67.md and raw/crawler/compute-accelerators-asterfusion-cx102s-dpu/20260706T204116541565Z-asterfusion-com-product-cx102s-dpu-b77dd4635a.md. No new external fetch was needed.
local_checks.wiki_search: Existing curated references mentioned Asterfusion Helium and CX102S only as raw DPU/SmartNIC comparison rows. No asterfusion-helium-dpu or asterfusion-cx102s-dpu-module SKU, observation, or resolved-spec row existed before this parent task.
local_checks.domain_index_scan: ai_infra wiki/index.md routes this work to Compute Accelerator Spec Catalog, Compute Accelerator Parameter Comparison, Network Storage Cluster Infrastructure, and AI Infra Coverage Map; no dedicated Asterfusion page was needed.
local_checks.prior_manifest_scan: Prior tasks resolved Corigine, Yusur, Resnics, NVIDIA H200, Biren, Cambricon, Kunlunxin, Kubernetes/Kueue/Volcano, AWS/Lambda, SGLang, and NVIDIA confidential-inference slices. This task does not repeat those rows and uses only Asterfusion-specific local raw captures.

duplicate_boundary_checks.result: No pre-existing Asterfusion SKU rows; added one Helium DPU SmartNIC row and one CX102S-DPU module-scoped row.

No pre-existing Asterfusion observations; added observations only for Helium form_factor, network_bandwidth, memory_capacity, host_interface, tdp, and CX102S-DPU module form_factor, memory_capacity, memory_type.
No pre-existing Asterfusion resolved fields; added resolved fields pointing to the new Asterfusion observations.
Existing Asterfusion raw comparison rows remain for unsupported or system-scoped text; the resolved table adds only the bounded source-visible fields.
Asterfusion remains product-specific DPU/SmartNIC catalog evidence, not general storage-fabric, benchmark, operations, incident, or SLO evidence.

Only hardware-accelerator and network-storage-cluster layers were updated; blocked KServe, inference-serving postmortem, MLCommons exact-result, RAG propagation/drift/alert/cost, chargeback, and production incident gaps remain unresolved.
Added a separate known_source entry for parent-9 Asterfusion DPU fields without mutating blocked_items or existing blocked coverage_gaps.

gap_reason: The local corpus already contained product-specific Asterfusion Helium and CX102S-DPU captures with schema-supported DPU fields that had not yet been promoted into the structured accelerator catalog.

fields.form_factor: DPU module inside 1U open intelligent gateway

schema_boundary.source_value: Helium EC2004Y 4 x 25GE SFP28 and Helium EC2002P 2 x 100GE QSFP28
schema_boundary.boundary: Physical port variants are not aggregated into a single resolved network_bandwidth field. The resolved 100 Gb/s value comes from the source-stated up-to-100Gbps mixed-service processing capability.

schema_boundary.source_value: Helium NFV comparison: 60G processing, 100 microsecond latency, 150k new sessions, 60w power
schema_boundary.boundary: Only the 60 W product-page power value is promoted as source comparison power. Processing, latency, session-count, and benchmark-like comparison values remain boundary evidence because the catalog lacks matching fields or validated benchmark context.

schema_boundary.source_value: Helium offload and acceleration text for network, security, storage, NVMe-oF(TCP), compression, UPF, IPSec, SSL, XDP/eBPF, vFW/vLB/vNAT, DPI, and DDoS
schema_boundary.boundary: Capability text is retained as raw comparison evidence only; it is not promoted as storage-fabric behavior, protocol performance, security correctness, incident evidence, or production-operation proof.

schema_boundary.source_value: CX102S 16 x 1GE RJ45, 2 x 10GE SFP+, and 72Gbps switching capacity
schema_boundary.boundary: Gateway switching capacity and port layout are system-scoped and not promoted as DPU network_bandwidth.

schema_boundary.source_value: CX102S product variants with one or two DPU modules
schema_boundary.boundary: The catalog row is module-scoped. It records 8 GB DDR4 module memory and does not aggregate memory across one-DPU or two-DPU gateway variants.

schema_boundary.source_value: CX102S software appliance scenarios such as router, firewall, VPN, IDS/IPS, NPB, OpenWrt, Debian, Ubuntu, OpenVPN, Snort, HAProxy, and ntopng
schema_boundary.boundary: Application and gateway software scenarios remain raw product-positioning evidence, not resolved accelerator fields or operations claims.

non_promoted_boundaries: No Corigine, Yusur, Resnics, NVIDIA H200/B200/B300/HGX, Biren, Cambricon, Kunlunxin, Kubernetes/Kueue/Volcano, AWS/Lambda, SGLang, KServe, inference-serving postmortem, MLCommons exact-result, RAG propagation/drift/alert/cost, chargeback, or production incident row was modified except as duplicate-boundary text where already present.

No benchmark ranking, service SLO, production incident/postmortem, protocol-level storage-fabric performance, legal-compliance completion, or generalized network/storage operations claim was promoted from the Asterfusion product pages.
No new external source was fetched, and no crawler subscriptions or Domain Channels were changed.
